_comment: Document index for Kevin Lane case. Add new documents by appending to the 'documents' array. status: 'filed' | 'obtained' | 'pending' | 'needed'. category: 'Medical Records' | 'Correspondence' | 'Diagnostics' | 'Genetic Testing' | 'Employment' | 'Legal'.

documents.title: Medical Malpractice Intake Consultation
documents.notes: Attorney-ready overview. Dual-defendant analysis. Economic damages $650K–$1.3M.

documents.title: Employment Furlough Notice
documents.notes: Furlough notice during active medical crisis.

documents.title: Reduction-in-Force (RIF) Notice
documents.notes: Issued same day as furlough. Critical for damages — Dr. Rosario's delay prevented accommodation paperwork.

documents.title: FEP Blue Insurance Claims
documents.notes: Full itemized insurance claims.

documents.title: Medical Negligence Analysis
documents.notes: Detailed analysis with standard of care violations and supporting literature.

documents.title: List of Providers
documents.notes: All providers with roles and date ranges.

documents.title: PA Timeline — Invitae/Labcorp
documents.notes: 48-day delay documentation.

documents.title: Voicemails — BayCare Neurology
documents.notes: 3 voicemails documenting PA delay and runaround (9/23, 10/2, 10/6).

documents.title: Dr. Gonzalez Notes to Dr. Kayani
documents.notes: Post-rhabdo rheumatology consultation notes sent to PCP.

documents.title: Labs Timeline Compilation (through 11-18-2025)
documents.notes: Complete chronological lab history with provider notes.

documents.title: Full Lab History 2010–2025
documents.notes: Complete lab history in PDF and Excel.

documents.title: CK / Rhabdomyolysis Lab Results (Jan 2024 – Aug 2025)
documents.notes: All CK values from both rhabdo episodes. Key evidence.

documents.title: Extended Myositis Panel
documents.notes: MSA Panel — negative for inflammatory myositis. Supports metabolic cause.

documents.title: Psych Labs — CMP
documents.notes: CMP ordered by Kinsler Psychology. Mildly elevated creatinine 1.31, elevated plasma lactate 2.3.

documents.title: Invitae Genetic Results — RQ7553840
documents.notes: Rhabdomyolysis and Metabolic Myopathy Panel. Two rare VUS in AGK gene + truncating VUS in AMPD1 (~94% enzyme function loss).

documents.title: Invitae Complete Results (Excel)
documents.notes: Full spreadsheet of genetic variants.

documents.title: Dr. Kayani Chart — Aug 5, 2025 (Day of Crisis)
documents.notes: FPLOL physical on day patient was hospitalized. Critical record.

documents.title: Dr. Gonzalez Rheumatology Notes
documents.notes: Post-rhabdo rheumatology evaluation. CK 92 — documented recovery.

documents.title: Dr. Rosario Neurology Consult
documents.notes: Initial neurology consult. Invitae panel ordered as 'critical.' Start of 48-day PA delay.

documents.title: Dr. Lee New Patient Visit Summary
documents.notes: New PCP establishing comprehensive care. Referrals to genetics, neurology, CT.

documents.title: EMG After Visit Summary
documents.notes: Normal EMG/NCS. Confirms metabolic (not structural) cause.

documents.title: MRI Brain — Normal
documents.notes: Normal. Rules out structural/neurological cause.

documents.title: Post-RIF Employment Concerns
documents.notes: Documentation of ongoing employment impact post-RIF.

documents.title: Mayo Clinic Genetics Report
documents.notes: Awaiting results from Feb 24, 2026 consultation. Will confirm VUS to definitive etiology.

documents.title: Expert Witness — Metabolic Medicine
documents.notes: Need metabolic medicine expert to testify on standard of care for CK monitoring.

documents.title: Expert Witness — Neurology / PA Process
documents.notes: Need neurology expert to testify on Fla. Stat. §627.42392 PA submission obligations.

documents.title: Economic Damages Expert Report
documents.notes: Formal economist report on FERS delta, wage loss, future medical expenses.
